title: UntranslatedItems: AlsoFluids
description: An addon of UntranslatedItems that also untranslates fluids.
body:
This is an addon to [UntranslatedItems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/untranslated-items "UntranslatedItems"), that also makes fluids untranslated.

 

Displays fluid names in English(US), regardless of the current language setting. If the fluid has a translation in the current language, it will be displayed in below too.

![Example1](https://i.imgur.com/C8tSKPr.png)![Example2](https://i.imgur.com/EjOrrDz.png)

  

### Warning:

**You can't open a quantum tank gui on multiplayer servers installing the UntranslatedItems:AlsoFluids ver 1.2.0!!!!**

**The server must update the mod!!!**

 

#### Notes:

*   This mod should to be used with [UntranslatedItems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/untranslated-items "UntranslatedItems").
*   This is a client-side mod, but __some mod integrations need to be install on the server side as well__.
*   Now only for MC 1.12.2 is available.
*   Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks.

 

#### Mod compatibilities (Only client side):

*   [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei "Just Enough Items (JEI)")
*   [Had Enough Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/had-enough-items "Had Enough Items")
*   [Applied Energistics 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/applied-energistics-2 "Applied Energistics 2")
*   [AE2 Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2-extended-life "AE2 Unofficial Extended Life")
*   [AE2 Fluid Crafting Rework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2-fluid-crafting-rework "AE2 Fluid Crafting Rework")
*   [Wireless Crafting Terminal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wireless-crafting-terminal "Wireless Crafting Terminal")
*   [Wireless Pattern Terminal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wireless-pattern-terminal "Wireless Pattern Terminal")
*   [AE2 Wireless Fluid Terminal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wireless-fluid-terminal "AE2 Wireless Fluid Terminal")
*   [GregTech CE: Unofficial](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtech-ce-unofficial "GregTech CE: Unofficial") (For old GTCEu(before 2.8), use v1.4.4 of UTI:AlsoFluids)
*   [FTB Quests (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge "FTB Quests(Forge)")
*   [Better Questing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-questing "Better Questing")
 

#### Mod compatibilities (Server side needed):

*   [The One Probe](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-one-probe "The One Probe") (only fluid block)
